label: Transparent marble motif source
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous transparent motif cutout source
Primary request: Create only a refined slab fragment of white marble with grey veining and faint blush stone undertones, isolated full subject, no environment, no props, no text.
Subject: an elegant irregular polished marble stone shard showing natural metamorphic veining, cool white base, soft grey veins, occasional warm blush mineral streaks, subtle crystalline stone depth, opaque material.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding; do not crop the subject. The stone should have a distinctive silhouette useful as a motif asset.
Lighting/mood: clean studio light that preserves natural stone color and veining detail, no cast shadow.
Transparent workflow: place the subject on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no props, no quarry scene, no decorative background, no second subject.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode design-system board for Morphous Marble, derived from the visible transparent marble motif cutout.
Reference use: Extract palette, texture rhythm, contrast, spacing mood, and interaction language from the marble motif: white stone, cool grey veins, faint blush mineral streaks, polished metamorphic quarry material. The board must visibly respect those motif colors.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, preferred 3840 x 2160 style composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide if available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Marble", motif story "metamorphic quarry / marble veining", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Typography: include English and Japanese examples; choose refined enterprise product UI font guidance that would work for multilingual product UI.
Style/medium: premium shadcn/tweakcn-style enterprise design system, realistic UI mockup, precise grid, quiet operational density, 8px card radius, restrained controls, marble vein divider lines, polished stone texture samples.
Color palette: use only motif-derived colors plus near-neutrals from the motif: Carrara white, quarry mist, vein grey, graphite vein, blush stone, polished charcoal.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no unrelated bright colors, no generic purple/blue gradients, no watermark, no random brand names, no illegible token tables.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Morphous dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Generate a dark-mode version of the Morphous Marble design-system board. It must feel like the same system translated to dark mode, not a new theme.
Reference use: Use the visible transparent marble motif and visible light design-system board as references. Preserve motif-derived palette roles, component language, texture, spacing, 8px radius, refined enterprise mood, and typography.
Canvas: wide 16:9 board, preferred 3840 x 2160 style composition.
Resolution and legibility: high-resolution 4K-class source board, at least 2400px wide if available. Use large readable labels and avoid dense tiny text.
Required visible sections: title "Morphous Marble", "Dark Mode", palette, typography, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, table, command/search, status states, texture, radius, spacing, shadow, tokens, generated asset examples.
Visual details: dark background derived from the motif's deepest graphite and charcoal vein colors, light text from Carrara white highlights, muted grey cards, restrained blush stone accents, subtle marble veining overlays, crisp shadcn-style enterprise controls.
Color palette: polished charcoal, graphite vein, quarry slate, vein grey, Carrara white, blush stone, rose mineral, soft clay.
Text: use short readable UI labels; avoid long paragraphs.
Constraints: no neon colors, no flat pure-black background, no unrelated saturated colors, no illegible text, no random brand names, no watermark.
